zh.Chagford, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文哈福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Crouche於1432年出生在英國戴文哈福德時，她的父親William Crouche24歲，母親Elizabeth De Luttrell20歲。她於1451年與John Frederick Orchard在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年在英國享年36歲。

zh-hans.Chagford, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文哈福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Crouche于1432年出生在英国戴文哈福德时，她的父亲William Crouche24岁，母亲Elizabeth De Luttrell20岁。她于1451年与John Frederick Orchard在英国英格兰戴文哈福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年在英国享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name denoting a person who lived by a cross, from an agent derivative of Middle English crouche, cruche ‘cross’. See also Crouch .

variants.name: Crouch
meanings: English (southeastern): from Middle English crouch(e), cruch(e) ‘cross’ (Old English crūc, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem; the Old English crūc was replaced in Middle English by the word cross, from Old Norse kross), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a cross.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Crouche was born in 1432, in Chagford, Devon, England, her father, William Crouche, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth De Luttrell, was 20. She married John Frederick Orchard in 1451, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1468, in England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Crouche est née en 1432, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Crouche, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Luttrell, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Frederick Orchard en 1451, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1468, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Crouche 1432 in Chagford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Crouche 24 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth De Luttrell 20. Sie hat 1451 in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom John Frederick Orchard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1468 im Alter von 36 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Crouche è nata il nel 1432 nel Chagford, Devon, England, sua padre, William Crouche, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth De Luttrell, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Frederick Orchard nel 1451, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1468, nel England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.Chagford, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Croucheが1432年にイギリスデボンチャグフォードで生まれた時，父William Croucheは24歳，母Elizabeth De Luttrellは20歳であった。1451年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードでJohn Frederick Orchardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年にイギリスで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Crouche(이)가 1432년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Crouche(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Luttrell(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 John Frederick Orchard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 영국에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Crouche nasceu em 1432, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Crouche, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Luttrell, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Frederick Orchard em 1451, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1468, em Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Crouche родилась в 1432 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Crouche было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Luttrell, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Frederick Orchard в 1451 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1468 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Crouche nació en 1432, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Crouche, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Luttrell, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Frederick Orchard en 1451, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1468, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
